statement.p: In one college math course, the final grade (out of 100 points) is calculated by adding one-third of the homework average, one-sixth of the class project score, one-fourth of the midterm score, and one-fourth of the final exam score.
Colt has 64 for his homework average, 85 for his class project score, and 85 for his midterm score. His goal is to finish the course with a final grade of 70. What must he score on the final exam?
